name: profiler-stream
title: Profiler / Stream
description: Multi-frame continuous Profiler sampling (snapshot + GC + hotpath + call counts). Writes JSONL summary file and outputs aggregated statistics (with P95/P99 percentiles) on completion. Supports fixed-frame and continuous modes. Auto-loads threshold fences; takes screenshot on violation.

parameters.name: frames
parameters.description: Number of frames to sample. 0 or negative = continuous mode (returns immediately, samples in background until stop signal). Default: 0

parameters.name: frameInterval
parameters.description: Frame interval (Unity frames to skip between samples). Default: 2

parameters.name: gcTopN
parameters.description: Top N GC allocations per frame. Default: 20

parameters.name: hotpathTopN
parameters.description: Top N hotpath functions per frame. Default: 20
